name: Horizon Copper Corp.
description: Horizon Copper Corp. is a Canada-based premier copper company. The company holds a portfolio of high-quality copper assets, including a 30% interest in the Hod Maden copper-gold project in Turkey, a 1.66% net smelter return royalty on the Antamina copper mine in Peru, and an equity interest in Entrée Resources Ltd., which holds a joint venture interest in the Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine in Mongolia. Horizon Copper is focused on growing its portfolio of copper-dominant assets to provide investors with leverage to the copper price.
